name: early-sepsis-detection-system
description: Root workspace to launch React Frontend and FastAPI Backend simultaneously.

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\activate.bat && uvicorn main:app --reload" "cd frontend && npx vite"
scripts.install-all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && .\venv\Scripts\activate.bat && pip install -r requirements.txt
